response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: Partially matched. The reference JSON provided lyrics only for the first verse and chorus, while Koyori performed the full short TV-size version and spoke during the live. Manual transcription was fully performed for the remaining vocals, interlude talk, and outro speech.
2. JSON Usage: Used the reference JSON as a guide for the first part of the song and performed manual transcription and translation for everything else. Added translations for system messages in the pixel RPG opening segment as visual events.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps were matched with precise audio vocalizations, keeping intervals seamless for fast-paced lyrics, while splitting interlude talk and the outro monologue naturally.

subtitles.original: 助手くんが仲間になった！
subtitles.english: Assistant-kun joined the party!

subtitles.original: AIこよりが仲間になった！
subtitles.english: AI Koyori joined the party!

subtitles.original: もふこよが仲間になった！
subtitles.english: Mofukoyo joined the party!

subtitles.original: へい！ カロスを照らすあの朝日のように
subtitles.english: Hey! Like that morning sun lighting up Kalos...

subtitles.original: （ニトロチャージ熱く行こうぜ）
subtitles.english: (Let's go hot with a Nitro Charge!)

subtitles.original: さあ！進もうぜ いつでも準備はOK
subtitles.english: Come on! Let's go, we're always ready

subtitles.original: （型破り 変幻自在で）
subtitles.english: (With Mold Breaker and Protean)

subtitles.original: 重なり合う想いがシンクロして
subtitles.english: Our overlapping feelings synchronize,

subtitles.original: 決して消えない絆になるから
subtitles.english: becoming a bond that will never fade.

subtitles.original: どこまでも強くなれる
subtitles.english: We can become stronger, no matter how far,

subtitles.original: 俺たちなら
subtitles.english: as long as it's us!

subtitles.original: いくぜ！！ 激しく燃えるバトル
subtitles.english: Let's go!! A fiercely burning battle!

subtitles.original: いくぜ！！ ピンチはチャンスだぜ
subtitles.english: Let's go!! A crisis is a chance!

subtitles.original: いこうぜ！！ 起死回生
subtitles.english: Let's go!! A miraculous recovery!

subtitles.original: 絶対に諦めない
subtitles.english: We will absolutely never give up!

subtitles.original: 俺たちは諦めない
subtitles.english: We won't give up!

subtitles.original: へい！たとえばどんな壁が道を塞いだって
subtitles.english: Hey! No matter what kind of wall blocks our way...

subtitles.original: （いつでも当たって砕けろで）
subtitles.english: (We'll always go for broke!)

subtitles.original: さあ！この手で勝利の星を掴むんだ
subtitles.english: Come on! Let's grab the star of victory with our hands...

subtitles.original: （折れない不屈の心で）
subtitles.english: (with an unbreakable, indomitable heart!)

subtitles.original: 俺たちはいつでもどんな時でも
subtitles.english: We are always, no matter when,

subtitles.original: 同じ心で繋がっているから
subtitles.english: connected with the same heart.

subtitles.original: 何度でも立ち上がるぜ
subtitles.english: So we will rise up again and again,

subtitles.original: お前となら
subtitles.english: as long as I'm with you!

subtitles.original: いくぜ！！ 手強いライバルたち
subtitles.english: Let's go!! Against tough rivals!

subtitles.original: いくぜ！！ 決めろ一撃必殺
subtitles.english: Let's go!! Land a one-hit KO!

subtitles.original: いこうぜ！！ 負けられない
subtitles.english: Let's go!! We cannot lose,

subtitles.original: 想いがここにあるから
subtitles.english: because our feelings are right here,

subtitles.original: 夢が俺たちにはあるから
subtitles.english: and we have our dreams!

subtitles.original: 博衣こより生誕ライブ2026！見に来てくれてありがとう！
subtitles.english: Hakui Koyori Birthday Live 2026! Thank you all for coming to watch!

subtitles.original: 神ゲーたちの神ゲームソングいっぱい詰め込んでるので、最後まで楽しんでいってね！
subtitles.english: I've packed this with tons of god-tier songs from god-tier games, so please enjoy it until the end!

subtitles.original: いくぜ！！ 勝ちも負ける痛みも
subtitles.english: Let's go!! Both victory and the pain of defeat...

subtitles.original: いくぜ！！ なんでも分け合える
subtitles.english: Let's go!! We can share anything!

subtitles.original: いこうぜ！！ 仲間がいる
subtitles.english: Let's go!! We have our friends.

subtitles.original: 俺たちは一人じゃない
subtitles.english: We are not alone!

subtitles.original: いくぜ！！ 激しく燃えるバトル
subtitles.english: Let's go!! A fiercely burning battle!

subtitles.original: いくぜ！！ ピンチはチャンスだぜ
subtitles.english: Let's go!! A crisis is a chance!

subtitles.original: いこうぜ！！ 起死回生
subtitles.english: Let's go!! A miraculous recovery!

subtitles.original: 絶対に諦めない
subtitles.english: We will absolutely never give up!

subtitles.original: いくぜ！！ 譲れない夢がある GO!
subtitles.english: Let's go!! There is a dream we can't yield!

subtitles.original: いくぜ！！ 必ずゲットだぜ
subtitles.english: Let's go!! We will definitely catch 'em all!

subtitles.original: いこうぜ！！ 手を伸ばして
subtitles.english: Let's go!! Reach out your hand...

subtitles.original: いつか描いた未来へ
subtitles.english: toward the future we once drew,

subtitles.original: 誰も知らない次元まで
subtitles.english: to a dimension nobody knows of!

subtitles.original: さあ！上げてくぜ 100万ボルト GO!
subtitles.english: Come on! Let's turn it up to a million volts!

subtitles.original: そう！立ち向かって共に行こうぜ
subtitles.english: Yes! Stand up and let's go together...

subtitles.original: 見たこともない dream の向こうまで
subtitles.english: to the other side of a dream we've never seen!

subtitles.original: はーい！みんな、こんこよー！
subtitles.english: Haaay! Everyone, Konkoyo!

subtitles.original: ホロライブ6期生、holoXの頭脳、博衣こよりだよー！
subtitles.english: I'm Hakui Koyori, a member of Hololive's 6th Gen and the brain of holoX!

subtitles.original: 改めて今日は、博衣こより生誕ライブ2026にお越しいただき、ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Once again, thank you so much for coming to Hakui Koyori Birthday Live 2026 today!

subtitles.original: コメントもいっぱいありがとう！イェーイ！かっこいい？見えてるよ、ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much for all the comments too! Yay! Do I look cool? I see you, thank you!

subtitles.original: ということで、ライブの感想やスクショはハッシュタグ「#博衣こより生誕ライブ2026」をつけて、たくさんポストしてください！
subtitles.english: And with that, please post your impressions and screenshots of the show with the hashtag #HakuiKoyoriBirthdayLive2026!
